query: SELECT slug, name, category, ownership_tier, auth_method, base_url, free_tier_limit, description FROM integration_providers ORDER BY ownership_tier, category;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute SELECT slug, name, category, ownership_tier, auth_method, base_url, free_tier_limit, description FROM integration_providers ORDER BY ownership_tier, category;

stdout:
slug	name	category	ownership_tier	auth_method	base_url	free_tier_limit	description
plaid-investments	Plaid	investments	platform	api_key	https://production.plaid.com	100 sandbox items	Financial account aggregation for investment accounts, balances, and transactions.
morningstar-data	Morningstar Data	investments	platform	api_key	https://api.morningstar.com/v2	500 calls/month	Investment research data including fund ratings, performance, and portfolio analytics.
yodlee-aggregation	Yodlee (Envestnet)	investments	platform	oauth2	https://production.api.yodlee.com/ysl	Sandbox only	Financial data aggregation covering 17,000+ financial institutions worldwide.
census-bureau	US Census Bureau	demographics	platform	api_key	https://api.census.gov/data	500 requests/day	Demographic data including population, income, education, and housing statistics.
fred-data	FRED (Federal Reserve)	economic	platform	api_key	https://api.stlouisfed.org/fred	120 requests/min	Economic data including interest rates, GDP, unemployment, and monetary policy indicators.
bls-data	Bureau of Labor Statistics	economic	platform	api_key	https://api.bls.gov/publicAPI/v2	500 queries/day	Employment, inflation (CPI), wages, and productivity data.
fullstory-enrichment	FullStory	enrichment	platform	api_key	https://api.fullstory.com	1,000 sessions/month	Digital experience analytics with session replay and behavioral insights.
finra-brokercheck	FINRA BrokerCheck	regulatory	platform	none	https://api.brokercheck.finra.org	Rate limited	Broker and advisor background verification, disciplinary history, and registration status.
sec-edgar	SEC EDGAR	regulatory	platform	none	https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST	10 requests/sec	SEC filings, company disclosures, and regulatory documents.
zillow-property	Zillow (Bridge Interactive)	property	platform	api_key	https://api.bridgedataoutput.com/api/v2	1,000 calls/day	Property valuation, listing data, and real estate market analytics.
hubspot-crm	HubSpot CRM	crm	organization	oauth2	https://api.hubapi.com	Unlimited contacts	Free CRM with contact management, deal tracking, and email integration.
salesforce-crm	Salesforce CRM	crm	organization	oauth2	https://login.salesforce.com	30 days	Enterprise CRM for client relationship management, pipeline tracking, and activity logging.
sendgrid-email	SendGrid	messaging	organization	api_key	https://api.sendgrid.com/v3	100 emails/day	Transactional and marketing email delivery with analytics and templates.
twilio-messaging	Twilio	messaging	organization	api_key	https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01	$15.50 credit	Programmable SMS, voice, and WhatsApp messaging for client communications.
vertafore-ams360	Vertafore AMS360	carrier	organization	api_key	https://api.vertafore.com	NULL	Insurance agency management with carrier connectivity and commission tracking.
applied-epic	Applied Epic	carrier	organization	oauth2	https://api.appliedsystems.com	NULL	Insurance agency management system for policy administration, accounting, and client management.
ipipeline-insurance	iPipeline	insurance	organization	api_key	https://api.ipipeline.com	NULL	Life insurance quoting, e-application, and underwriting automation.
zapier-middleware	Zapier	middleware	organization	api_key	https://hooks.zapier.com	100 tasks/month	No-code automation platform connecting 6,000+ apps with triggers and actions.
redtail-crm	Redtail CRM	crm	professional	api_key	https://api.redtailtechnology.com/crm/v1	30 days	Financial services CRM with compliance archiving and workflow automation.
wealthbox-crm	Wealthbox CRM	crm	professional	api_key	https://api.wealthbox.com/v1	14 days	Purpose-built CRM for financial advisors with compliance workflows and client portal.
apollo	Apollo.io	enrichment	professional	api_key	https://api.apollo.io/api/v1	10000 credits/month	People and company enrichment platform with verified emails, phone numbers, employment history, and company data. 10,000 free credits/month per API key.
